output.sparql:
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?lake WHERE {
  ?lake wdt:P31 wd:Q12736 ; wdt:P2044 ?depth .
  ?depth wikibase:quantityValue ?value ; wikibase:quantityUnit wd:Q11573 .
  FILTER(xsd:float(?value) > 400)
}
output.answer: The lakes with a depth larger than 400 meters include Lake Baikal (1,642 meters) and Lake Superior (406 meters).
